input.question: What percentage of students would recommend each course?

payload.question: What percentage of students would recommend each course?

output.sql:
SELECT
  cf.course_id AS course_id,
  cf.course_name AS course_name,
  COUNT(*) AS total_responses,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cf.would_recommend = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN cf.would_recommend = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM course_feedback cf
GROUP BY cf.course_id, cf.course_name
ORDER BY recommend_percentage DESC;

visualization.description: Bar chart showing the percentage of students who would recommend each course.
visualization.title: Percentage of Students Who Would Recommend Each Course

payload.sql:
SELECT
  cf.course_id AS course_id,
  cf.course_name AS course_name,
  COUNT(*) AS total_responses,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cf.would_recommend = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN cf.would_recommend = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM course_feedback cf
GROUP BY cf.course_id, cf.course_name
ORDER BY recommend_percentage DESC;
